ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPLegal = true, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'SetUp', ISPICKVAL(EligibleEuroclearSettlement__c, 'true'), ISBLANK(CFICode__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Eligible Euroclear Settlement = true, you must provide a CFI Code of 6 digits.
